positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial forest picnic. The scene features glowing bioluminescent flora, giant glowing mushrooms, and a picnic basket brimming with fantastical fruits and pastries. Two friendly, stylized woodland creatures (like a fox and a badger) are sitting together on a checkered blanket, looking content. The art style should be highly detailed vector illustration mixed with watercolor texture, utilizing bold black outlines for clean silhouettes. The color palette is rich jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with creamy white highlights and golden accents. Composition is centered and balanced, designed for optimal scaling on T-shirts and tote bags. Flat graphic design aesthetic with deep dimensionality and dramatic lighting.
